channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Labour leadership race: Key moments in the challenge to take on Keir Starmer
item.description: Labour leadership race: Key moments in the challenge to take on Keir Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
item.description: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM

item.title: BBC Politics: Analysis: Andy Burnham's route back to Commons is clearer - but can he win in Makerfield?
item.description: Analysis: Andy Burnham's route back to Commons is clearer - but can he win in Makerfield?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Streeting says Burnham has ‘best chance of winning’ Makerfield by-election battle with Reform
item.description: Starmer latest: Streeting says Burnham has ‘best chance of winning’ Makerfield by-election battle with Reform

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Yeah, they just won't campaign aggressively. Though it does speak of the predicament that Starmer has left Labour in that even in a "terrible" seat they have cleared 10% in almost every ward there in the locals.
item.description: Yeah, they just won't campaign aggressively. Though it does speak of the predicament that Starmer has left Labour in that even in a "terrible" seat they have cleared 10% in almost every ward there in the locals.

item.title: FT UK Politics: Wes Streeting backs Andy Burnham’s by-election run
item.description: Wes Streeting backs Andy Burnham’s by-election run

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Two theories on our high prime ministerial turnover...
item.description: Two theories on our high prime ministerial turnover...

item.title: FT UK Politics: Gilts fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer
item.description: Gilts fall as traders brace for Burnham to challenge Starmer

item.title: BBC Politics: UK borrowing costs reach new high and pound falls as leadership drama continues
item.description: UK borrowing costs reach new high and pound falls as leadership drama continues

item.title: The Telegraph: Starmer’s new Health Secretary is a parody of the Labour lanyard class - The Telegraph
item.description: Starmer’s new Health Secretary is a parody of the Labour lanyard class - The Telegraph
